description:
Add a workflow-skills capability that reviews a target project, documents what is already present, then performs a second review pass to provide actionable feedback.

Acceptance criteria:
- The workflow skill can inspect a project/workflow workspace and produce a structured inventory of relevant artifacts: skills, workflow docs, specs/plans, tests, scripts, and obvious entry points.
- The inventory distinguishes observed facts from inferences and open questions, so downstream feedback is grounded in project evidence.
- A review pass evaluates the documented inventory and source context for gaps, inconsistencies, missing tests/docs, unclear workflow boundaries, and next-step recommendations.
- Output is suitable for a user-facing review report and for later durable project documentation without requiring live LLM judgment for deterministic discovery steps.
- Offline tests cover the deterministic inventory/report-shaping logic; LLM use is reserved for judgment-oriented feedback.
title: workflow skills project inventory and feedback review
